/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/MarkdownEditor.dir/MarkdownEditor_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MarkdownEditor.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MarkdownEditor.dir/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MarkdownEditor.dir/markdownparser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MarkdownEditor.dir/spellchecker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MarkdownEditor.dir/helpwindow.cpp.o -o MarkdownEditor  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.4.2 -lhunspell-1.7 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
